name: Maple Butter
directions: Cream 1 stick softened butter until fluffy.
With mixer on low, pour 1 cup maple syrup into the butter.
Beat until smooth and light.

name: My 6 Cup Breakfast
directions: Mix all together.
Store it in tuperware cereal boxes it will last in our house about 1 month before u make more.
Good for breakfast and a snack.
Just add milk and a low-calorie sweetener.

name: Breakfast Peanut Butter Balls
directions: In a medium bowl, mix peanut butter, dry milk powder, and honey until smooth.
Crush cereal by placing in plastic bag and crushing with rolling pin or by hand.
Add raisins and crushed cereal to peanut butter mixture.
Mix thoroughly.
With your hands, form into balls the size of a nickel.
Roll in, or sprinkle with, powdered sugar, if desired.
Store in refrigerator for up to 2 weeks, or in the freezer for up to 3 months.

name: Cold Breakfast Oatmeal
directions: The night before your breakfast, mix oats, milk, cinnamon and sweetner (if using) together in a cereal bowl.
If you are using frozen blueberries, add these the night before also.
Cover with plastic wrap and place in the fridge overnight.
In the morning, add your fresh berries (if using) and stir gently. Enjoy.

name: Multigrain Baking Mix
directions: In a 4-quart mixing bowl, combine all ingredients except the canola oil.
Stir oil into dry ingredients and mix well.
Store in large air-tight container or several smaller ones in fridge or freezer.

name: Yummy Breakfast Yogurt With Oatmeal
directions: Mix all together, enjoy!
Typically, I mix yogurt, sugar and vanilla in morning, add oats immediately before I leave for work and eat once I get there (about 1/2 hour later). It is delicious!
